zh.action.chat.label: 文本合成
zh.action.chat.description: MiniMax 文本合成：支持多轮对话、工具调用(Function Calling)、图片理解、思维链推理
zh.action.chatHer.label: 角色对话
zh.action.chatHer.description: MiniMax 角色对话（M2-her）：支持角色扮演、多轮对话，可定义角色人设和世界观
zh.action.tts.label: 语音合成
zh.action.tts.description: MiniMax 文字转语音（同步 TTS），支持多种音色、情绪、语速控制
zh.action.musicGeneration.label: 音乐生成
zh.action.musicGeneration.description: MiniMax 音乐生成：通过描述和歌词生成歌曲，支持翻唱模式
zh.action.lyricsGeneration.label: 歌词生成
zh.action.lyricsGeneration.description: MiniMax 歌词生成：支持完整歌曲创作和歌词编辑/续写
zh.action.textToVideo.label: 文生视频
zh.action.textToVideo.description: MiniMax 文生视频：通过文字描述生成视频，支持运镜控制指令
zh.action.imageToVideo.label: 图生视频
zh.action.imageToVideo.description: MiniMax 图生视频：基于图片和文字描述生成视频
zh.action.startEndToVideo.label: 首尾帧视频
zh.action.startEndToVideo.description: MiniMax 首尾帧生成视频：基于起始帧和结束帧图片生成过渡视频
zh.action.subjectToVideo.label: 主体参考视频
zh.action.subjectToVideo.description: MiniMax 主体参考视频：基于人物主体图片生成视频（保持人物一致性）
zh.action.videoQuery.label: 视频任务查询
zh.action.videoQuery.description: 查询 MiniMax 视频生成任务状态（Preparing/Queueing/Processing/Success/Fail）
zh.action.videoDownload.label: 视频下载
zh.action.videoDownload.description: 通过 fileId 获取 MiniMax 视频下载链接（有效期1小时）
zh.field.apiKey.label: API Key
zh.field.model.label: 模型

zh.field.userSystem.tooltip: 用户角色的系统设定（user_system role）

zh.field.sampleMessages.tooltip: 用 sample_message_user / sample_message_ai 角色提供对话示例

zh.field.text.tooltip: 待合成语音的文本（<10000字符）

zh.field.prompt.music.tooltip: 描述风格、情绪、场景，如"流行音乐, 难过, 适合在下雨的晚上"
zh.field.lyrics.label: 歌词
zh.field.lyrics.music.tooltip: 用 \n 分隔每行，支持结构标签如 [Verse] [Chorus] 等

zh.field.audioUrl.tooltip: 翻唱模式专用：参考音频URL（6秒-6分钟，最大50MB）
zh.field.prompt.lyrics.label: 描述
zh.field.prompt.lyrics.tooltip: 歌曲主题/风格描述，如"一首关于夏日海边的轻快情歌"
zh.field.mode.label: 模式

zh.field.title.tooltip: 指定标题后输出保持该标题不变

zh.field.prompt.i2v.label: 视频描述
zh.field.prompt.i2v.tooltip: 视频文字描述（最大2000字符），支持运镜指令
zh.field.lastFrameImage.label: 尾帧图片
zh.field.lastFrameImage.tooltip: 结束帧图片 URL 或 Base64 Data URL

en.action.chat.label: Text Completion
en.action.chat.description: MiniMax text completion: multi-turn chat, function calling, image understanding, chain-of-thought reasoning
en.action.chatHer.label: Roleplay Chat
en.action.chatHer.description: MiniMax roleplay chat (M2-her): supports character roleplay, multi-turn conversation, customizable persona and worldview
en.action.tts.label: Text to Speech
en.action.tts.description: MiniMax text-to-speech (sync TTS), multiple voices, emotions, and speed control
en.action.musicGeneration.label: Music Generation
en.action.musicGeneration.description: MiniMax music generation: generate songs from descriptions and lyrics, cover mode supported
en.action.lyricsGeneration.label: Lyrics Generation
en.action.lyricsGeneration.description: MiniMax lyrics generation: full song creation and lyrics editing/continuation
en.action.textToVideo.label: Text to Video
en.action.textToVideo.description: MiniMax text-to-video: generate video from text descriptions with camera control
en.action.imageToVideo.label: Image to Video
en.action.imageToVideo.description: MiniMax image-to-video: generate video from an image and text description
en.action.startEndToVideo.label: Start-End Frame Video
en.action.startEndToVideo.description: MiniMax start-end frame video: generate transition video from start and end frame images
en.action.subjectToVideo.label: Subject Reference Video
en.action.subjectToVideo.description: MiniMax subject reference video: generate video from a character image (maintains character consistency)
en.action.videoQuery.label: Video Task Query
en.action.videoQuery.description: Query MiniMax video generation task status (Preparing/Queueing/Processing/Success/Fail)
en.action.videoDownload.label: Video Download
en.action.videoDownload.description: Get MiniMax video download link by fileId (valid for 1 hour)

en.field.systemPrompt.tooltip: System behavior instructions, defining the AI role and constraints

en.field.temperature.chat.tooltip: 0-1, controls randomness. Higher is more random. Recommended: 0.7-1.0

en.field.group.label: Group Settings

en.field.sampleMessages.tooltip: Provide dialogue examples using sample_message_user / sample_message_ai roles

en.field.voiceId.tooltip: System voice ID, e.g. male-qn-qingse, English_Graceful_Lady

en.field.lyrics.music.tooltip: Separate lines with \n, supports structure tags like [Verse] [Chorus]
